title: SEBI Extends Compliance Timelines for Merchant Bankers!
content:
# SEBI Extends Compliance Timelines for Merchant Bankers!

Ek important update hai! Government ne SEBI (Securities and Exchange Board of India) circular dated January 02, 2026, ke kuch provisions ke compliance ke liye timelines extend karne ka announce kiya hai.

Market participants ki representations ko consider karte hue, jisme operational challenges aur financial year-end ke saath alignment ki request thi, SEBI ne merchant bankers ko relief diya hai.

*   **Original Circular:** SEBI Circular No. HO/49/11/11(106)2025-CFD-RAC-DIL3/1/1796/2026 dated January 02, 2026.
*   **Extension Circular:** SEBI Circular No. HO/49/14/15(2)2026-CFD-POD1/I/13567/2026 dated June 11, 2026.

**Revised Compliance Timelines:**

*   **Transfer of activities to Separate Business Units (SBUs) under Regulation 13A(2) of the Merchant Bankers Regulations and compliance with Clause 11.2.10 of the January 2, 2026 Circular:**
    *   **Old Due Date:** July 3, 2026
    *   **New Due Date:** December 31, 2026
*   **Phase I Net Worth Requirements (Regulation 7) and Liquid Net Worth Requirements (Regulation 7A):**
    *   **Old Due Date:** January 2, 2027
    *   **New Due Date:** March 31, 2027
*   **Phase II Net Worth Requirements (Regulation 7) and Liquid Net Worth Requirements (Regulation 7A):**
    *   **Old Due Date:** January 2, 2028
    *   **New Due Date:** March 31, 2028
*   **Intimation to SEBI regarding categorisation as Category I or Category II Merchant Banker:**
    *   **New Due Date:** March 31, 2027

All other provisions of the January 02, 2026 circular will remain unchanged.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.sebi.gov.in/legal/circulars/jun-2026/extension-of-timelines-for-compliance-with-certain-provisions-of-circular-dated-january-02-2026_83730.html)

*Published on: 12 June 2026*
